Home / Service Areas / Kirkland

Smart-home in Kirkland, WA

Trusted local professionals serving Kirkland and surrounding communities

Serving Kirkland, WA

Summit Smart Home brings luxury automation to Kirkland's waterfront properties on Lake Washington. Our systems enhance lakefront living with smart lighting for stunning views, automated blinds, and climate control for year-round comfort. The persistent rain and mild winters make our leak detection and smart irrigation systems essential for protecting your home and landscape.

Kirkland's scenic waterfront homes benefit greatly from smart home technology that complements their natural surroundings.
